title: cynosurus dactylon
intro: Cynosurus dactylon, also known as Bermuda grass, is a perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cynosurus dactylon include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
